title: VMware HGFS Quick Mount / Eject Helper
description: Clean Bash helpers to easily mount and unmount VMware Host Shared Folders using `vmhgfs-fuse`.

title: OpenVPN Custom Config
description: This is a step-by-step instructions to create and manage a custom `systemd` service for automatically starting the TryHackMe VPN using OpenVPN.

title: THM: RootMe
description: Linux privilege escalation challenge involving SUID binaries, sudo misconfigurations, and kernel exploits to gain root access on a compromised system.
